title: Trudoc Beskid grammar support

source.subject: feat(trudoc): add Beskid grammar support and update package configuration

body:
Trudoc gains Beskid grammar highlighting/validation for fenced code blocks in book and platform-spec content.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`e679792`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/e679792)
- **Subject:** feat(trudoc): add Beskid grammar support and update package configuration
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-verify-main`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **verify-all-on-main evidence** (`v03-verify-main`).
